chunks.text: Course Homepages | EECS at UC Berkeley Home Academics Courses Course Homepages EECS Course Homepages The EECS course homepages have moved to new addresses. To find the homepage for a particular course, try our semester class schedules . You can also

, try our semester class schedules . You can also go to most course homepages directly by adding the capitalized course number to "https://www2.eecs.berkeley.edu/Courses/", e.g., https://www2.eecs.berk eley.edu/Courses/EE16B .
